name: Bratwurst with Apple Kraut
recipeIngredient: 4 tart apples, peeled, cored, and sliced (3 cups)
recipeInstructions:
%%%%% BRATWURST WITH APPLE KRAUT %%%%%
1. Place all ingredients in a crockery cooker.
2. Stir in 1/4 cup water.
3. Cover and cook on low-heat setting for 3 to 4 hours.
Makes 6 servings.
ORIGIN: Better Homes and Gardens: Crockery Cooking
FROM: Sharon Stevens.
